title: XbrlFinancialFact
description: A single XBRL financial fact from an SEC EDGAR filing, representing one tagged data point from a company's financial statements.

cik.description: The SEC Central Index Key (CIK) of the filing entity, zero-padded to 10 digits

taxonomy.description: The XBRL taxonomy namespace prefix used for this fact

concept.description: The XBRL taxonomy element (tag) name for this fact

entityName.description: Legal name of the filing entity

units.description: Array of unit groupings for this fact

UnitFacts.description: Facts reported in a specific unit of measure

Fact.description: A single data point from a specific filing period

start.description: Start date for period-based facts (e.g. income statement items)

end.description: End date for the reporting period

val.description: The numeric value of the fact

accn.description: SEC accession number of the filing containing this fact

fp.description: Fiscal period (Q1, Q2, Q3, Q4, FY, H1, H2)

form.description: SEC form type for the filing

filed.description: Date the filing was submitted to SEC EDGAR

frame.description: XBRL frame identifier for period/concept aggregation
